pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh Python data generation script which explicitly adds participant 'child-99' with randomized low reaction times (50-120ms).
Verified via setup_task.sh Python data generation script which explicitly loops from 1 to 30 to create exactly 30 valid participants.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated MFFT cognitive style analysis data created dynamically in setup_task.sh. Inspection of the generation script confirms there are exactly 30 valid participants ('child-01' through 'child-30') and exactly 1 contaminated participant ('child-99') containing mechanical button-mashing artifacts (RT < 150ms), perfectly matching the metadata claims.
